en.hero.description: QuantCell is a professional quantitative trading platform with high-performance backtesting, real-time market data, AI-powered strategy generation, and unified multi-exchange trading. Write strategies in pure Python with an intuitive API, run lightning-fast backtests, and deploy to production seamlessly.
en.features.title: Powerful Features for Quantitative Trading
en.features.subtitle: Everything you need to develop, test, and deploy professional trading strategies
en.features.backtesting.title: High-Performance Backtesting
en.features.backtesting.description: Self-developed high-performance backtesting engine supporting both event-driven and vectorized execution modes. Intelligent caching and parallel processing for maximum speed.
en.features.ai.title: AI Strategy Generation
en.features.ai.description: AI-powered strategy generation with thinking chain support. Automatically generate, validate, and optimize trading strategies using large language models.
en.features.realtime.title: Real-time Market Data
en.features.realtime.description: WebSocket-based real-time data streaming with automatic reconnection. Support for multiple data sources and historical data management.
en.features.exchanges.title: Unified Exchange Trading
en.features.exchanges.description: Unified API for Binance, OKX, and more. Seamlessly switch between exchanges with consistent interface for both backtesting and live trading.
en.features.risk.title: Risk Management
en.features.risk.description: Comprehensive risk controls with position sizing, stop-loss, take-profit, and portfolio-level risk monitoring for safer trading.
en.features.visualization.title: Advanced Visualization
en.features.visualization.description: Professional K-line charts with technical indicators, trade markers, backtest replay, and comprehensive performance analysis dashboards.
en.architecture.title: Modern Architecture
en.architecture.description: Clean separation of concerns with adapter pattern design. Use the same strategy code for both backtesting and live trading across multiple exchanges.
en.architecture.points.adapter.title: Unified Execution
en.architecture.points.adapter.description: Strategy core separated from execution engines. Seamlessly switch between backtesting and live trading with the same strategy code.
en.architecture.points.performance.title: High Performance
en.architecture.points.performance.descript: Self-developed execution engine with intelligent caching and parallel processing for lightning-fast backtests and real-time trading.
en.architecture.points.extensible.title: AI-Powered Extension
en.architecture.points.extensible.descripti: Rich hook functions for customization plus AI strategy generation with thinking chain support for automated strategy development.
en.code.title: Simple Yet Powerful
en.code.subtitle: Write your strategy in pure Python. QuantCell handles the complexity.
en.code.features.intuitive.title: Intuitive API
en.code.features.intuitive.description: Clean, Pythonic interface that feels natural to quantitative traders and developers alike.
en.code.features.hooks.title: Rich Hook System
en.code.features.hooks.description: Pre/post processing hooks for data, signals, and positions. Customize without modifying core code.
en.code.features.optimization.title: Built-in Optimization
en.code.features.optimization.description: Automatic caching, parallel execution, and JIT compilation for maximum performance.
en.opensource.title: Open Source & Community Driven
en.opensource.description: QuantCell is proudly open source. Join our growing community of traders and developers.
en.footer.description: An open-source quantitative trading platform built for professional traders and developers.

zh.hero.description: QuantCell 是专业的量化交易平台，支持高性能回测、实时市场数据、AI 策略生成和统一多交易所交易。使用纯 Python 和直观的 API 编写策略，运行闪电般快速的回测，并无缝部署到生产环境。
zh.features.title: 强大的量化交易功能
zh.features.subtitle: 开发、测试和部署专业交易策略所需的一切
zh.features.backtesting.title: 高性能回测
zh.features.backtesting.description: 自主研发的高性能回测引擎，支持事件驱动和向量化两种执行模式。智能缓存和并行处理实现极致速度。
zh.features.ai.title: AI 策略生成
zh.features.ai.description: 基于思维链的 AI 策略生成。使用大语言模型自动生成、验证和优化交易策略。
zh.features.realtime.title: 实时市场数据
zh.features.realtime.description: 基于 WebSocket 的实时数据流，支持自动重连。支持多数据源和历史数据管理。
zh.features.exchanges.title: 统一交易所交易
zh.features.exchanges.description: 统一的 API 支持 Binance、OKX 等交易所。使用一致的接口在交易所之间无缝切换，支持回测和实盘交易。
zh.features.risk.title: 风险管理
zh.features.risk.description: 全面的风险控制，包括仓位管理、止损止盈和投资组合级别的风险监控，让交易更安全。
zh.features.visualization.title: 高级可视化
zh.features.visualization.description: 专业的 K 线图，支持技术指标、交易标记、回测回放和全面的绩效分析仪表盘。
zh.architecture.title: 现代架构
zh.architecture.description: 采用适配器模式设计，关注点分离清晰。同一套策略代码可用于回测和实盘交易，支持多交易所。
zh.architecture.points.adapter.title: 统一执行
zh.architecture.points.adapter.description: 策略核心与执行引擎分离。可在回测和实盘交易之间无缝切换，使用同一套策略代码。
zh.architecture.points.performance.title: 高性能
zh.architecture.points.performance.descript: 自主研发的执行引擎，配备智能缓存和并行处理，实现闪电般的回测速度和实时交易性能。
zh.architecture.points.extensible.title: AI 驱动扩展
zh.architecture.points.extensible.descripti: 丰富的钩子函数支持自定义，加上基于思维链的 AI 策略生成功能，实现自动化策略开发。
zh.code.title: 简单而强大
zh.code.subtitle: 用纯 Python 编写策略。QuantCell 处理复杂性。
zh.code.features.intuitive.title: 直观的 API
zh.code.features.intuitive.description: 简洁、Pythonic 的接口，让量化交易者和开发者都感到自然。
zh.code.features.hooks.title: 丰富的钩子系统
zh.code.features.hooks.description: 数据、信号和仓位的预处理/后处理钩子。无需修改核心代码即可自定义。
zh.code.features.optimization.title: 内置优化
zh.code.features.optimization.description: 自动缓存、并行执行和 JIT 编译，实现最佳性能。
zh.opensource.title: 开源与社区驱动
zh.opensource.description: QuantCell 是自豪的开源项目。加入我们不断壮大的交易者和开发者社区。
zh.footer.description: 为专业交易者和开发者打造的开源量化交易平台。
